hooks.command: echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\.env' && echo 'BLOCK: Do not edit .env files — they contain credentials' && exit 1 || exit 0
FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // .filePath // empty'); [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q '\.yml$' && python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('$FILE'))" 2>&1 || true
